Event: Tabletop Hustle
Event Date: 01/06/2024
Sage Bot Item Code: A164
Paper Trio

Triggers: Once in a while

Missile Cluster
Launches 3 magic missiles at random enemies:
The first missile reduces the physical armor of the target by 35% for 5 sec, deals 250000 physical damage, and ages the target for 5 sec. The target has its max health reduced by 25%, spell power reduced by 25%, and damage reduced by 50%. Only one aging effect can be cast on an enemy.
The second missile reduces the magic armor of the target by 35% for 5 sec, deals 250000 magic damage, and drains the target's life force for 5 sec. While low on life force, the enemy deals 35% less damage and takes 35% more damage.
The third missile deals 150000 pure damage and silences the target's armor, weapon, and artifact for 5 sec. During this time, the enemy can't use their armor, weapon, and artifact abilities.
If all missiles hit the same enemy, that enemy takes an extra pure damage equal to 20% of their missing health.

Requirements: 90-100

User rating: item not rated yet
